Per-holding movement is net-positive this tick: (i) MAHABANK -5.88% → -5.77% (+11 bps — REVERSED the 13:30 one-tick negative, recovery envelope re-intact), (ii) PNBHOUSING +4.17% → +4.78% (+61 bps — strong firming, now largest MTM gainer at +₹3,760), (iii) HINDUNILVR -2.80% → -2.87% (-7 bps — still widening but DECELERATED from 13:30's -26 bps rate), (iv) NTPC -0.91% → -1.04% (-13 bps — marginal drift), (v) AUBANK +0.09% → +0.11% (+2 bps — essentially flat, still nearly zero), (vi) GRANULES +0.51% → +0.44% (-7 bps — marginal cooling), (vii) NESTLEIND +0.28% → +0.39% (+11 bps — SL tightened ₹1,400 → ₹1,405 this tick, CORRECT direction, continues partial reversal of prior drift-loosening), (viii) GOLDBEES -0.98% → -0.90% (+8 bps). Net tick reading: the 13:30 mild reversal was a one-tick wobble, not regime shift — recovery envelope re-asserted without strategy intervention. No new trades, no OPEN orders.

Re-armed de-escalation rule: if BFSI % creeps past 37.0% SOLELY via MTM-gaining names, do NOT fire min_confidence — that logic is already in the 13:30 spec under 'if_BFSI_pct_of_total_ge_37.0_via_MTM_only'.

hold_rationale: No numeric overrides changed this tick. (1) NO spec-hard trigger fired. Every threshold remains on its tolerance side of the fire line: book -0.177% (inside -1% by 82.3 bps), MAHABANK -5.77% (INSIDE -6% by 23 bps, past -7% buffer 123 bps, past -8% buffer 223 bps), BFSI 36.01% (inside 37% by 0.99 pp), HINDUNILVR -2.87% (inside -4% by 113 bps). (2) The 13:30 ARMED CONDITIONAL specifically targeted at the 14:00 tick ('if silence 3h+ AND MAHABANK below -5.88% → elevate to conditional HIGH') FAILED its component test: silence leg TRUE (3h 17m), but MAHABANK leg FALSE (MAHABANK at -5.77%, 11 bps ABOVE -5.88% — improved, not re-degraded). The conditional elevation path was pre-specified and the triggering logic cleanly evaluates to 'do not elevate.' (3) Book REVERSED direction this tick (+₹846 recovery after 13:30's -₹915 deterioration) — the 13:30 mild negative was a one-tick wobble, not a regime break. Firing a lever on a recovering tick would be counter-directional. (4) MAHABANK likewise RE-ASSERTED its recovery envelope (+11 bps) after the 13:30 single-tick negative; buffers to all three MAHABANK fire lines (-6%, -7%, -8%) WIDENED. Trigger direction is beneficial. (5) HINDUNILVR drift-rate DECELERATED 74% (-26 bps → -7 bps per 30 min) — the 13:30 re-armed DIRECTIONAL-widening watch is now effectively MONITOR-only for today. (6) BFSI concentration nominally tightened 1.02 → 0.99 pp buffer, but the cause is a PNBHOUSING gainer firming (+61 bps MTM) — a positive P&L phenomenon that mechanically increases sector %. The 13:30 spec's explicit MTM-only gate applies: do NOT fire min_confidence on this. (7) Admission surface open for 3h 17m with no admission — tightening max_deployed_pct now would simulate strategy-layer activity by closing a door that is not being walked through; undoing the beneficial SELL → freed-cash → quality-gated-BUY regime for the sake of motion. (8) The composite HIGH meta-trigger direction REVERSED from TOWARD-elevation (13:30) to AWAY-from-elevation (14:00) on both non-silence legs — tightening against a beneficially-moving vector would be contra-indicated. (9) Strategy silence past 3h is per spec a strategy_reviewer escalation flag, NOT a risk_monitor numeric lever — the correct handoff is the 16:30 IST strategy_reviewer tick. (10) Existing override stack (min_confidence 0.60, max_position_pct 0.15, max_deployed_pct 0.70, default_sl_pct 0.015, min_sl_pct 0.01, max_sl_pct 0.04) already gates every admission surface tightly; adding collateral knobs without a firing trigger would be theatrical and abandon the established 'tighten when spec fires, hold when it doesn't' discipline. Disciplined HOLD is the correct action. Elevated monitoring vector for 14:30: the 4h strategy-silence trip at 14:43:24 — 43 min from this tick — combined with any book re-degradation would constitute a structurally-beyond-tolerance regime.
